durable_improvement: Added and CI-wired a credential-binding workflow validator that fails closed when the Cloudflare environment, required secret references, access-probe gate, project name, exact github.sha binding, or secret non-disclosure invariant drifts.
blocker: Valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN values must exist in the cloudflare-research GitHub environment before the production workflow can prove a resolving deployment.
next_action: Dispatch .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml after environment configuration, then require the access probe, Wrangler URL, control-plane metadata, served identity, signed proof, and acceptance artifact to agree on the same commit.
